---
title: "normalizeAgenticMemoryCommittedFactLogBackendReadResult()"
description: "Normalize a D592 backend read output into D589 read result DATA. Reads remain stream-ordered committed facts with a D589 fact-stream cursor. Backend cursors/diagnostics are audit or issue DATA only and are never used as fact-log cursors or replay/materialization authority."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Normalize a D592 backend read output into D589 read result DATA.

Reads remain stream-ordered committed facts with a D589 fact-stream cursor.
Backend cursors/diagnostics are audit or issue DATA only and are never used
as fact-log cursors or replay/materialization authority.

## Import

```ts
import { normalizeAgenticMemoryCommittedFactLogBackendReadResult } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function normalizeAgenticMemoryCommittedFactLogBackendReadResult(
	output: unknown,
	opts: { readonly fallbackCursor?: AgenticMemoryCommittedFactCursor } = {},
): AgenticMemoryCommittedFactReadResult<TJson>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `output` | `unknown` | Backend-supplied read output. |
| `opts` | `{ readonly fallbackCursor?: AgenticMemoryCommittedFactCursor }` | Optional fallback fact-stream cursor for malformed outputs. |

## Returns

A D589 `AgenticMemoryCommittedFactReadResult`.
